red diesel.text: From 1 April 2022 the UK removed the entitlement to use red diesel (rebated diesel) for most sectors including construction and haulage-adjacent off-road use, as part of red diesel reform announced at Budget 2020. Eligible uses are now sharply restricted.
Fuel duty rebates for off-road use were withdrawn for most industries from April 2022; businesses must now use full-duty white diesel.

fuel duty rebate haulage.text: The 2022 red diesel reform removed off-road rebate entitlement for the affected sectors, eliminating the rebate a PTO fuel-duty recovery service would depend on.
